data.title: The top three currencies in Gate Alpha’s trading volume yesterday: BR, ICNT, TSLAX
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, the top three currencies in terms of daily trading volume on Gate Alpha on July 3 were: BR, ICNT, and TSLAX.
Alpha has listed KIRBY (KIRBY), Nia (Nia), Uranus (URANUS), and Don't Burn Capital (DBC) today. The xStocks section also listed Nasdaq xStock (QQQx) and other tokens. You can trade by entering the APP. The third Gate Alpha Points Festival has been opened. Participants in the transaction can share the million-dollar prize pool, and you can receive a $100 reward for completing the designated tasks.
Gate Alpha now supports popular public chains such as SOL, ETH, BNB Chain, and Base. Users can use USDT in the spot account to directly purchase popular assets on the chain without manually changing chains, recharging or authorizing.

data.title: Paper gold, paper bitcoin: Is there an issue with ETFs?
data.description:
Is Bitcoin becoming paper gold? Rising ETF exposure fuels concerns over custody, transparency, and proof of reserves. The article Paper gold, paper bitcoin: Is there an issue with ETFs? was first published on Crypto Valley Journal.

data.title: Amber International raises $25.5 million to fuel $100 million crypto reserve strategy
data.description:
The Nasdaq-listed firm said it plans to use the proceeds to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched earlier this year.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/361046/amber-international-26-million-raise-crypto-reserve?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Amber International Completes $25.5 Million Private Funding to Advance $100 Million Crypto Reserve Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Amber International, a listed subsidiary of Amber Group, announced the completion of a $25.5 million private placement financing, with investors including Pantera Capital, CMAG Funds and other institutions. The funds will be used to support its $100 million crypto reserve strategy launched in May, aimed at promoting the long-term development of the ecosystem and product innovation. Currently, its reserve assets have covered BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, XRP and SUI, focusing on the layout of RWA asset tokenization and AgentFi. (The Block)

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs had a total net inflow of $602 million yesterday, with Fidelity ETF FBTC leading the way with a net inflow of $237 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 3, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$602 million.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Fidelity ETF FBTC, with a single-day net inflow of US$237 million. Currently, FBTC's total net inflow has reached US$12.209 billion.
The second is Blackrock ETF IBIT, with a single-day net inflow of US$225 million. Currently, IBIT's total net inflow has reached US$52.646 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is US$137.597 billion, and the ETF net asset ratio (market value to total Bitcoin market value) is 6.29%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$49.642 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net inflow of US$149 million yesterday, and Grayscale ETHE alone had a net outflow of US$5.3548 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (July 3, Eastern Time), the total net inflow of Ethereum spot ETFs was US$149 million.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net inflow in a single day yesterday was Blackrock ETF ETHA, with a single-day net inflow of US$85.3849 million. Currently, ETHA's total net inflow has reached US$5.616 billion.
The second is Fidelity ETF FETH, with a single-day net inflow of US$64.6466 million. Currently, FETH's total net inflow has reached US$1.739 billion.
The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest net outflow in a single day yesterday was Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE, with a single-day net outflow of US$5.3548 million. Currently, ETHE's total net outflow has reached US$4.30 billion.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is US$10.826 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 3.45%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$4.398 billion.

data.title: This week's mining data highlights: Bitcoin price breaks through the 110,000 mark; Bitcoin mining company Bit Digital raises $150 million to buy ETH and will withdraw from BTC mining later
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News, Week 26, 2025 (June 27-July 3):
1. According to cloverpool, the average computing power of the entire Bitcoin network is 860 EH/s, the highest is 995 EH/s, and the lowest is 723 EH/s, which is 3.77% higher than the average computing power last week (829 EH/s).
2. According to cloverpool, the block height 903,168 was produced at 13:23:16 on June 29, with an average block production time of 9 minutes and 26 seconds, and the mining difficulty is 116.96 T, which is 7.48% lower than the previous adjustment cycle.
3. According to blockchain.com, the average price of Bitcoin is US$107,356, the highest is US$110,590, and the lowest is US$105,120, which is 2.94% higher than the average price last week (US$104,287).
4. Mining news worth noting include:
(1) Bitcoin mining company Bit Digital raised $150 million to purchase ETH and will withdraw from BTC mining later;
(2) French listed company Crypto Blockchain Industries announced that it will implement a non-dilutive shareholder loan of up to 20 million euros (about 23.4 million US dollars), and the proceeds will be used to purchase Bitcoin and mining equipment.
(3) US listed company NIP Group (NASDAQ: NIPG) announced its entry into the Bitcoin mining field. NIP Group has signed a final asset purchase agreement to acquire cryptocurrency mining machines from Fortune Peak Limited and Apex Cyber ​​Capital Limited for Bitcoin mining, with a total computing power of 3.11 EH/s and an estimated monthly output of about 60 Bitcoins. At present, NIP Group has established a dedicated digital computing department to manage the operation of the acquired products.
Data partner: Cango Inc. (CANG), a Bitcoin mining company listed on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Dormant Bitcoin Wallet Activated After 14 Years
data.description: According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, a Bitcoin address containing 10,000 BTC, valued at approximately $1,092,973,486, has been activated after being dormant for 14.3 years. In 2011, the value of this Bitcoin was merely $7,793. The activation of such a long-dormant wallet has drawn significant attention from the cryptocurrency community, highlighting the potential for substantial value changes over time.

data.title: Detroit Sues Crypto Real Estate Platform Over Safety, Health Violations
data.description:
The city alleges the asset tokenization platform left hundreds of properties in disrepair, even as it promised significant returns.
source: https://decrypt.co/328586/detroit-sues-crypto-real-estate-platform-safety-health-violations

data.title: Detroit Sues Real Token Over Property Management Issues
data.description: According to PANews, Detroit has filed a lawsuit against the cryptocurrency real estate platform Real Token and its 165 affiliated limited liability companies. This legal action is described as the largest nuisance abatement lawsuit to date. The lawsuit alleges that the blockchain-based real estate investment platform has failed to meet health and safety standards for the 400 properties it manages, putting tenants at risk. It is reported that tenants in over 400 properties lack heating, water, or functional shower facilities. Detroit is seeking a court order to compel the platform's founders to carry out necessary repairs, establish a rent escrow account, and hold them personally accountable.

data.title: UK and Singapore Strengthen Digital Finance Collaboration
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, UK and Singapore officials convened in London this week for the tenth UK-Singapore Financial Dialogue, reaching several agreements in the digital finance sector. They committed to advancing Project Guardian, which aims to test the practical applications of tokenized financial assets. The next phase will involve closer collaboration with industry groups such as the UK Investment Association and the Singapore Investment Management Association.

The discussions also highlighted the Global Layer One initiative, which seeks to establish a shared ledger system to reduce technical and regulatory barriers in cross-border tokenized asset transactions.

data.title: UK and Singapore Forge New AI and Tokenization Pact in London Talks
data.description:
Officials are exploring cooperation in digital finance, ranging from asset tokenization to artificial intelligence.
source: https://decrypt.co/328583/uk-singapore-ai-tokenization-pact-london-talks

data.title: Due to power restrictions and weather in Texas, the output of many Bitcoin mining companies decreased in June
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The output of many Bitcoin mining companies decreased in June, mainly due to participation in the Texas electricity demand response project. Riot Platforms produced 450 BTC this month, a decrease of 12% month-on-month. Its CEO said that the "economic power restriction" strategy was used to reduce peak electricity costs and improve competitiveness. Cipher Mining produced 160 BTC and also reduced operations due to active avoidance of 4CP fees; MARA Holdings decreased by 25% year-on-year, producing 211 BTC, affected by weather and equipment factors. In contrast, CleanSpark grew against the trend by 6.7%, producing 445 BTC and achieving the 20 EH/s mid-year computing power target. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump hits Iran with more oil sanctions under ‘maximum pressure’ policy
data.description:
The White House announced new sanctions against Iran’s oil network on Thursday, piling more pressure on Tehran’s economy as President Trump pushes forward with his maximum pressure policy. The penalties, confirmed by the Treasury and State departments, target dozens of companies and tankers accused of secretly helping Iran sell billions in oil under fake identities. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-hits-iran-with-more-oil-sanctions/

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Firms Face Production Challenges Amid Texas Power Curtailment
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, several Bitcoin mining companies experienced a decline in production during June, primarily due to power curtailment measures in Texas. Riot Platforms reported a 12% decrease in Bitcoin production, mining 450 BTC compared to 514 BTC in May. Riot CEO Jason Les highlighted the company's power strategy, which includes economic curtailment and participation in the Electric Reliability Council of Texas’s Four Coincident Peak (4CP) and other demand response programs. This approach, he noted, significantly contributes to grid stability while enhancing Riot's competitive positioning.

The 4CP program, which began in June, is a tariff designed to manage peak electricity demand during the summer months. Large electricity consumers, such as Bitcoin miners, face transmission charges based on their usage during these peak periods, prompting them to voluntarily curtail operations. Riot also disclosed that it sold 397 BTC for $41.7 million and currently holds 19,273 Bitcoin.

Cipher Mining also reported a decrease in production, mining 160 BTC in June. The company sold 58 BTC and holds 1,063 Bitcoin. Cipher attributed the reduced production to its proactive 4CP avoidance strategy, which allowed it to avoid costly penalties and maintain low power costs. Despite the strategic curtailment, Cipher's Black Pearl facility in Texas began contributing to production at the end of June.

MARA Holdings experienced a 25% reduction in production, mining 211 Bitcoin compared to 282 in May. As of June 30, MARA held 49,940 BTC and did not sell any during the month. CEO Fred Thiel cited reduced uptime due to weather-related curtailment and the temporary deployment of older machines at its Garden City, Texas, facility as reasons for the decline. He also mentioned natural variability in block luck as a contributing factor.

In contrast, CleanSpark increased its Bitcoin production by 6.7% in June, surpassing its mid-year hashrate target of 20 exahashes per second (EH/s). The company produced 445 Bitcoin and sold only 8, bringing its total holdings to 6,591 Bitcoin by the end of the month. This increase in production sets CleanSpark apart from other mining firms facing challenges due to power curtailment in Texas.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Holdings Concentrated Among Top Wallets
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from Santiment reveals that the top ten wallets holding USD Coin possess only 27% of its total supply. In comparison, Chainlink's top wallets hold 32% of its supply. Shiba Inu shows the highest concentration, with its top ten wallets holding 62% of the total supply.
